channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ says it's no longer illegal to download TikTok on federal devices
item.description: The Justice Department ruled this week that a federal ban on TikTok for government devices is no longer in effect.

item.title: Dangerous wildfire smoke impacting more than a dozen states
item.description: Dangerous wildfire smoke is affecting over a dozen states on Saturday, with air quality alerts from the Upper Midwest and Great Lakes to the Northeast.

item.title: What to know about Trump's claim that over 250K non-citizens are registered to vote
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin sent letters to four states alleging 250,000 non-citizens were registered to vote. Election officials...

item.title: Mullin threatens to withhold aid if states don’t comply with DHS election directives
item.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin threatened to withhold federal election aid from states that do not follow the administration's voting roll policies.
